title: Slithering Strangler
move_pattern: Starts with Constrict. After Constrict, randomly picks either Thwack or Lash (both can repeat). After Thwack or Lash, returns to Constrict.
notes: Alternates between Constrict and a random attack. The move ID in code is 'TWACK' but the localization title is 'Thwack'. Block amount for Thwack is hardcoded at 5 (not ascension-scaled).
